currentFocus: Apple-inspired responsive assistive display with live transcript preview, settings modal, and service registration flow

knownBehavior.sampleTextPreview: automatic empty-state sample text appears only while the Display controls are open
knownBehavior.marginGuides: flash only while the margin slider is being dragged; margin slider uses custom track-width pointer mapping, supports 0-40%, controls transcript text-flow width, and disables drawer hit-testing during active drag
knownBehavior.providerSetup: handled in the settings modal via source lists plus a separate registration card
knownBehavior.manualTranscriptCards: use a neutral human silhouette icon and do not inherit the active mode icon
knownBehavior.operatorRailWidth: is draggable from the divider, stored in browser storage, and clamped to the current viewport

nextSteps: Keep .agent/rules.md and Memory files updated after verified changes.
Keep docs and wiki aligned with UI behavior changes.
Refresh screenshots after notable visual updates.
Keep the operator rail compact and the display centered.
